---
name: Feature Request / 機能リクエスト
about: Suggest a new feature / 新機能を提案する
title: "[Feature] "

---

## Description / 説明
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case / ユースケース
Why would this feature be useful?

## Possible Solution / 解決案
If you have ideas on how to implement this.
